CustomField.description: If there is an upcoming open house, ONLY enter the date and time written in this format: Monday, June 12th (06/12/17) 5:00 - 8:00 PM
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If there is an upcoming open house, ONLY enter the date and time written in this format: Monday, June 12th (06/12/17) 5:00 - 8:00 PM
CustomField.label: Next Open House
